title: Sub-agent type manifest
description:
Registers a named sub-agent type with the harness. When the parent agent invokes the built-in `spawn_subagent` tool with `subagent_type: '<name>'`, the harness materialises a fresh §2.5 state machine with this manifest's `system_prompt_addendum`, `tool_allowlist`, `default_max_turns`, and optional `model_routing` override. The sub-agent runs to completion and returns a single tool-result message to the parent; the parent never sees the sub-agent's intermediate turns.

Stored at `~/.atelier/subagents/<name>.json` (global), `<repo>/.atelier/subagents/<name>.json` (per-repo, overrides global), or bundled in `crates/atelier-core/subagents/` (overridable by either). Bundled v1: `researcher`, `test-runner`, `general-purpose`.

name.description: Subagent-type identifier. Referenced by the parent's `spawn_subagent` tool call via `subagent_type: '<name>'`. Per-repo manifests override same-name global; both override bundled.

description.description: One-line description shown in the GUI subagent-type picker and used to help the parent model decide when to delegate.

system_prompt_addendum.description: Appended to the harness's base system prompt for sub-agent turns. Use to establish the sub-agent's persona, restrictions, and output expectations (e.g., 'You are a research sub-agent. Investigate, do not edit. Report findings in under 300 words.').

tool_allowlist.description: If present, restricts the sub-agent to only these tool names. Names match the registered tool set (built-in + MCP-routed). If absent, the sub-agent inherits the parent's full tool set.

default_max_turns.description: Cap on the sub-agent's §2.5 state-machine turn count. The parent can override on a per-invocation basis via the `spawn_subagent` tool's `max_turns` argument. PROVISIONAL default 10 if not set here and not overridden by the caller.

model_routing.description: Optional per-subagent routing override. When absent, the sub-agent inherits the session's routing (`schemas/config/routing.v1.json`). When present, fully replaces the routing for this sub-agent only.

side_effect_class_cap.description: Caps the maximum tool-call side-effect class this sub-agent may invoke. Calls above the cap are refused. Useful for restricting a `researcher` sub-agent to read-only operations. Default: no cap (inherits parent's §8 trust budget).
